/usr/bin/g++ -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -O0 -g -Wdeprecated-declarations -fPIC -g -Wdeprecated-declarations -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage CMakeFiles/test_isay_speech_queue.dir/UtteranceTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_isay_speech_queue.dir/UtterQueueTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_isay_speech_queue.dir/SayerTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_isay_speech_queue.dir/VoiceUtilsTest.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/test_isay_speech_queue.dir/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/ivp/src/iSay/Sayer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test_isay_speech_queue.dir/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/ivp/src/iSay/Utterance.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test_isay_speech_queue.dir/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/ivp/src/iSay/UtterQueue.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/test_isay_speech_queue.dir/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/ivp/src/iSay/VoiceUtils.cpp.o" -o /Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp-cicd-testing/bin/test_isay_speech_queue   -L/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/lib ../../../../lib/libgtest_main.a -lapputil -lgenutil -lmbutil /Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/build/MOOS/MOOSCore/lib/libMOOS.a ../../../../lib/libgtest.a -lm
